label: Symphony Talent Employer Brand Comparative Audit Project Live Evidence Target Review Pack

review_items.page_name: Symphony Talent Careers or jobs site
review_items.desired_element: Human-selected page element that best supports the Careers or jobs site evidence goal without capturing the full page.
review_items.evidence_goal: Capture the primary employer value proposition and talent promise.
acceptance_criteria: The captured evidence is scoped to the named element, not the full page.
The element visibly supports the Careers or jobs site source category.
The element preserves enough surrounding labels or headings to understand the evidence out of context.
The element can be reviewed against the stated KILOS relevance before capture execution.
